mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.phone, u.avatar_url, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.update_time AS last_active_time, IFNULL(p.post_count, 0) AS post_count, IFNULL(c.comment_count, 0) AS comment_count, IFNULL(co.collect_count, 0) AS collect_count, IFNULL(r.report_count7d, 0) AS report_count7d, IFNULL(p.post_count1h, 0) AS post_count1h, IFNULL(c.comment_count10m, 0) AS comment_count10m, CASE WHEN IFNULL(p.post_count1h, 0) >= 5 THEN '发帖过多' WHEN IFNULL(c.comment_count10m, 0) >= 6 THEN '评论过密' WHEN IFNULL(r.report_count7d, 0) >= 3 THEN '举报过多' ELSE '正常' END AS risk_level FROM user u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) AS post_count, SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS post_count1h FROM post GROUP BY user_id ) p ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) AS comment_count, SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS comment_count10m FROM post_comment GROUP BY user_id ) c ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) AS collect_count FROM post_collect GROUP BY user_id ) co ON co.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.user_id AS user_id, COUNT(1) AS report_count7d FROM post_report r INNER JOIN post p ON p.id = r.post_id WHERE r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND r.status = 0 GROUP BY p.user_id ) r ON r.user_id = u.id
(u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.id = #{keyword})
AND ( #{riskType} = 'normal' AND IFNULL(p.post_count1h, 0) < 5 AND IFNULL(c.comment_count10m, 0) < 6 AND IFNULL(r.report_count7d, 0) < 3 OR #{riskType} = 'post' AND IFNULL(p.post_count1h, 0) >= 5 OR #{riskType} = 'comment' AND IFNULL(c.comment_count10m, 0) >= 6 OR #{riskType} = 'report' AND IFNULL(r.report_count7d, 0) >= 3 )
ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) AS post_count, SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS post_count1h FROM post GROUP BY user_id ) p ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) AS comment_count, SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS comment_count10m FROM post_comment GROUP BY user_id ) c ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.user_id AS user_id, COUNT(1) AS report_count7d FROM post_report r INNER JOIN post p ON p.id = r.post_id WHERE r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND r.status = 0 GROUP BY p.user_id ) r ON r.user_id = u.id
(u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.id = #{keyword})
AND ( #{riskType} = 'normal' AND IFNULL(p.post_count1h, 0) < 5 AND IFNULL(c.comment_count10m, 0) < 6 AND IFNULL(r.report_count7d, 0) < 3 OR #{riskType} = 'post' AND IFNULL(p.post_count1h, 0) >= 5 OR #{riskType} = 'comment' AND IFNULL(c.comment_count10m, 0) >= 6 OR #{riskType} = 'report' AND IFNULL(r.report_count7d, 0) >= 3 )

SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.phone, u.avatar_url, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.update_time AS last_active_time, IFNULL(p.post_count, 0) AS post_count, IFNULL(c.comment_count, 0) AS comment_count, IFNULL(co.collect_count, 0) AS collect_count, IFNULL(r.report_count7d, 0) AS report_count7d, IFNULL(p.post_count1h, 0) AS post_count1h, IFNULL(c.comment_count10m, 0) AS comment_count10m, CASE WHEN IFNULL(p.post_count1h, 0) >= 5 THEN '发帖过多' WHEN IFNULL(c.comment_count10m, 0) >= 6 THEN '评论过密' WHEN IFNULL(r.report_count7d, 0) >= 3 THEN '举报过多' ELSE '正常' END AS risk_level FROM user u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) AS post_count, SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS post_count1h FROM post GROUP BY user_id ) p ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) AS comment_count, SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS comment_count10m FROM post_comment GROUP BY user_id ) c ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) AS collect_count FROM post_collect GROUP BY user_id ) co ON co.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.user_id AS user_id, COUNT(1) AS report_count7d FROM post_report r INNER JOIN post p ON p.id = r.post_id WHERE r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND r.status = 0 GROUP BY p.user_id ) r ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, type, title, description, category, price, location, lost_found_time, lost_status, images, contact, status, view_count, like_count, comment_count, report_count, collect_count, create_time, update_time FROM post WHERE user_id = #{id} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT id, post_id, user_id, content, parent_id, create_time FROM post_comment WHERE user_id = #{id} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.type, p.title, p.description, p.category, p.price, p.location, p.lost_found_time, p.lost_status, p.images, p.contact, p.status, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.report_count, p.collect_count, p.create_time, p.update_time FROM post_collect pc INNER JOIN post p ON p.id = pc.post_id WHERE pc.user_id = #{id} ORDER BY pc.id DESC LIMIT 50
